title: Quest Mini Food Processor / 400ml Capacity/Electric Fruit & Vegetable Chopper for Kitchen/Stainless Steel Dual Blade / 2 Speed Settings / 350W (31550)
features: MINI CHOPPER – This versatile, multifunctional food processor covers a variety of food preparation needs. With 350W of power, the blender can chop fruit, vegetables, and more, making it suitable for meal prep, blending purees and plenty of other kitchen needs.

STAINLESS STEEL BLADE – The food chopper features an S-shaped stainless-steel dual blade, which effectively slices through foods and is easy to clean afterwards. The blade is contained within a transparent plastic bowl, so you can monitor the food chopping process at any time.

2 SPEED SETTINGS – Easily control how your food will be chopped with the two speed settings – simply operated by two large buttons on the top. Choose from a low-speed setting, ideal for chopping softer fruit and veg for salads and salsas, and a high-speed setting, strong enough to chop harder ingredients like carrots and nuts.

SAFE & SECURE – Safety is paramount with this chopper, with a secure lid that prevents mess during use, and a safety lock that prevents accidental operation. Its base features anti-slip feet, ensuring it always remains stable on a worktop during use.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Previous page Stainless Steel Blade The stainless steel blade slices through food effectively and is easy to wipe clean. Transparent Bowl The transparent bowl allows you to monitor progress and features a safety lock lid. Easy Clean The bowl and blade can be safely removed, making washing a quick and simple process. Versatile Use With this appliance, you can chop and process foods for meal prep & blend foods for purees & sauces. 2 Speed Settings Choose between a slower speed setting for softer fruits and a faster setting for harder foods.
